titleStmt.title: SII 9.30: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 30. (A.R. No. 93 of 1913.) ON A PILLAR IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE MALLIKARJUNASVAMIN TEMPLE AT KAMBADURU, KALYANADRUG TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 887, Krōdhana, Phālguṇa, Amāvāsye, Ādityavāra, Sūryagrahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 965 March 5, Sunday; the solar eclipse took place on Monday. It refers itself to the reign of the Noḻamba-Pallava king Iṟiva-Noḻambādhirāja. The illustrious Poḻalchōradēva, the grandson of the king, is stated to have made a gift of the bittuvāṭa for the repairs of the Beḻdugunde tank. The hundred-and-six Gāvuṇḍas of the village were ordered to take care of the tank. Chāvuṇḍayya of Śrīvatsa-gōtra, the minister of Poḻalchōradēva, erected this pillar of Poḻalchōra's benefaction. Āychavemma wrote and Maṇiyammōja engraved the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmadidambaredā
nāycavemma besaṁge
yda maṇiya
mmōjar .
© svasti . samadhigata
pañcamahāśabda palla
vānvaya śrīpṛthuvīva
llabha pallavakulatila
kaikavākya śrīmadiṟiva
noḻambādhirājaṁ pṛthu
vīrājyaṁgeyuttire ta
tpādapadmōpajīviya
graputraṁ chaladaṅkakāṟa
nātanagratanūjaṁ sama
dhigatapañcamahāśa
bda pallavānvaya śrīpṛ
thuvīvallabha palla
varāmaca
raṇakama

ḷayugaḷā
mōdamudi
tamadhukarā
yamāṇa kāñcī
purādhipati vikra
marāmaṁ turagavi
dyādhara dhaḻadaṁ
kakāṟaṁ rājamanō
jaṁ drōhacaḻakkaṁ
komaraviḷāsaṁ
tiṟdānemalla
noḻambara bhīmaṁ
pusigegoyvoṁ rāja
rājāśrayaṁ śrīma
tpoḻalcōradēvaṁ śa
kakālameṇṭunūrembha
ttēḻaneya krōdhanasaṁ
vatsarada phālguṇamā
sadamavasayumādi
tyavāramāge sūryya

grahaṇa
dandu be
ḻdugundeya
keṟeya bi
ttuvāṭamaṁ ke
ṟege goṭṭar
Ida nūraṟu
varggavuṇḍuga
ḷnaḍeyipari
dannaḻidāta ka
vileyuṁ vā
raṇāsiyuvana
ḻida pañcamahā
pātakanakkuṁ
svadattāṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō haranti vasuṁdharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasaha
śrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē kṛmiḥ . sā
mānyōyaṁ dharmmasē
turnṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē
pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ
sarvvānētānbhāginaṟpārtthi
vēndrānbhūyō bhū
yācatē rā

śrīpoḻalcōradēvaniṣṭā
mātyaṁ śrīvatsagōtra
jaṁ cāvuṇḍayya biṭṭani
daṁ niṟisidaṁ poḻalcōra
dēvana dharmmōdyōgakīrtti
yaśastambamanī likhi
taśilāstambhamaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
